query:
SELECT f.id, f.code, f.name, f.sectionId, s.name as section_name, s.code as section_code
FROM formFields f
JOIN formSections s ON f.sectionId = s.id
WHERE s.code = 'attachments';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT f.id, f.code, f.name, f.sectionId, s.name as section_name, s.code as section_code
FROM formFields f
JOIN formSections s ON f.sectionId = s.id
WHERE s.code = 'attachments';
